items.name: mysql-select-limit-comma
items.sql: SELECT `u`.`id`, "hello" AS `label` FROM `users` AS `u` WHERE `u`.`id` = 1 LIMIT 5, 10

items.name: mysql-select-join
items.sql: SELECT `u`.`id`, `u`.`name`, `o`.`order_no` FROM `users` `u` JOIN `orders` `o` ON `u`.`id` = `o`.`user_id` WHERE `o`.`status` = "paid"

items.name: mysql-hash-comment
items.sql: SELECT 1 # mysql line comment

items.name: mysql-insert-values-multi-row
items.sql: INSERT INTO `users` (`id`, `name`) VALUES (1, "bob"), (2, 'alice')

items.name: mysql-insert-select
items.sql: INSERT INTO `archive_users` (`id`, `name`) SELECT `id`, `name` FROM `users` WHERE `status` = "inactive"

items.name: mysql-update-basic
items.sql: UPDATE `users` SET `name` = "carol", `status` = 'active' WHERE `id` = 1

items.name: mysql-delete-conditional
items.sql: DELETE FROM `users` WHERE `id` = 1 AND `status` = "inactive"

items.name: mysql-create-table-basic
items.sql: CREATE TABLE `users` (`id` INT, `name` VARCHAR(64))

items.name: mysql-alter-table-add-column
items.sql: ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN `age` INT

items.name: mysql-create-view
items.sql: CREATE VIEW `v_users` AS SELECT `id`, `name` FROM `users`

items.name: mysql-drop-table
items.sql: DROP TABLE `users`

items.name: mysql-start-transaction
items.sql: START TRANSACTION; COMMIT

items.name: mysql-unsupported-keywords-in-string
items.sql: SELECT 'INSERT IGNORE' AS msg FROM `users`

items.name: mysql-unsupported-keywords-in-comment
items.sql: SELECT `id` FROM `users` /* ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE */ WHERE `id` = 1

items.name: mysql-use-database
items.sql: USE analytics

items.name: mysql-use-quoted-database
items.sql: USE `analytics-prod`

items.name: mysql-use-database-in-multi-statement
items.sql: USE `analytics-prod`; SELECT * FROM `users`

items.name: mysql-insert-question-params
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, age) VALUES (?, ?, ?)

items.name: mysql-update-question-params
items.sql: UPDATE users SET email = ? WHERE username = ?

items.sql: PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?'

items.name: mysql-execute-using
items.sql: EXECUTE stmt USING @user_id

items.name: mysql-deallocate-prepare
items.sql: DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt

items.name: mysql-drop-prepare
items.sql: DROP PREPARE stmt

items.name: mysql-select-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id = ? AND status = ?

items.name: mysql-select-in-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)

items.name: mysql-select-limit-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE ? ORDER BY id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?)

items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?), (?, ?)

items.sql: UPDATE users SET name = ?, status = ? WHERE id = ?

expect.deparse_contains: PREPARE stmt FROM 'INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?)'

items.name: mysql-prepare-from-user-variable
items.sql: PREPARE stmt FROM @sql_text

items.name: mysql-execute-using-multiple-vars
items.sql: EXECUTE stmt USING @id, @name

items.name: mysql-view-concat-function
items.sql: SELECT CONCAT(first_name, last_name) FROM users WHERE id = ?

items.name: mysql-view-case-expression
items.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN state = 1 THEN name ELSE fallback_name END FROM users

items.name: mysql-view-case-predicate-bind
items.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN phone = ? THEN name ELSE email END AS v FROM users

items.name: mysql-view-group-having-order
items.sql: SELECT dept, COUNT(id) FROM users GROUP BY dept HAVING COUNT(id) > 1 ORDER BY dept

items.name: mysql-view-update-question-binds
items.sql: UPDATE users SET ip = ? WHERE id = ?

items.name: mysql-view-join-on
items.sql: SELECT u.name FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = ?

items.name: mysql-select-between-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE age BETWEEN ? AND ?

items.name: mysql-select-not-in-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE status NOT IN (?, ?)

items.name: mysql-select-not-between-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE age NOT BETWEEN ? AND ?

items.name: mysql-select-not-like-question-param
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE ?

items.name: mysql-select-distinct-like-param
items.sql: SELECT DISTINCT `name` FROM `table1` WHERE `name` LIKE ?

items.name: mysql-select-left-join-alias-star
items.sql: SELECT u.*, o.`order_no` FROM `users` u LEFT JOIN `orders` o ON u.`id` = o.`user_id` WHERE o.`status` = ?

items.name: mysql-delete-in-question-params
items.sql: DELETE FROM `users` WHERE `email` IN (?, ?)

items.name: mysql-update-in-question-params
items.sql: UPDATE `users` SET `note` = ? WHERE `phone` IN (?, ?)

items.name: mysql-select-derived-table-filter
items.sql: SELECT t.`id`, t.`phone` FROM (SELECT `id`, `phone` FROM `users` WHERE `status` = ?) t WHERE t.`phone` = ?

items.name: mysql-select-derived-query-graph
items.sql: SELECT s.`inner_name` AS `outer_name` FROM (SELECT `id`, `name` AS `inner_name` FROM `users` WHERE `age` <= ?) s WHERE s.`inner_name` LIKE ?

items.name: mysql-select-json-extract
items.sql: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(`extra`, '$.phone') AS phone_json FROM `users` WHERE `id` = ?

items.sql: UPDATE `users` SET `a` = ? WHERE `b` = ?; UPDATE `users` SET `c` = ? WHERE `d` = ?

items.sql: SELECT a.id, a.name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM `viq-test`.`users` WHERE `active` = 1) a;

items.sql: SELECT id, name FROM (SELECT name, id, age FROM `viq-test`.`users`);

items.name: mysql-select-reference-022
items.sql: SELECT b.* FROM (SELECT a.* FROM (SELECT id, name FROM `viq-test`.`users`) a WHERE id > 10) b WHERE name LIKE 'A%';

items.name: mysql-select-reference-023
items.sql: SELECT b.* FROM (SELECT a.* FROM (SELECT `id`, `name` FROM `viq-test`.`users`) a WHERE id > 10) b WHERE name LIKE 'A%';

items.name: mysql-select-reference-025
items.sql: select * from (select id as aa, department as cc, name as bb FROM (select e.*,rownum as row_num from `viq-test`.`employees_uuid` e where rownum <= 100) where row_num >= 1 and (id = 1 or id=2)) where aa = 1;

items.name: mysql-select-reference-027
items.sql: select b.* from (select id as `aa`, `department` as cc, name as bb FROM (select e.*,rownum as row_num from `viq-test`.`employees_uuid` e where rownum <= 100) a where row_num >= 1 and (id = 1 or id=2)) b where aa = 1;

items.name: mysql-select-reference-029
items.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.*, `ROWNUM` rn FROM `viq-test`.`employees_uuid` e WHERE `ROWNUM` <= 100) WHERE rn > 50;
